parsedJson.summary: The site shows the service and phone number clearly, but the dated visual style and weak trust proof make it feel less current than a Brisbane roofing customer would expect.

issues.title: Hero design feels dated
issues.what_observed: The desktop hero uses a pale washed-out roof photo with a large angled translucent white overlay cutting through the middle of the image.
issues.why_problem: A local customer comparing roofers may read this as an older website that has not been refreshed in years, which can make the business feel less active or less premium.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A sharp real roofing project photo with a simple dark or light overlay, clear headline, visible service area, and one strong phone or quote button above the fold.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the faded angled hero treatment with a high-resolution Brisbane roof project image, flat overlay for text contrast, and a single primary CTA block.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页大图看起来有点旧，透明斜块和发白的照片让网站不像最近更新过。
issues.customer_impact: 客户通常会在几秒内判断这家公司靠不靠谱。如果第一眼显旧，从 Google 商家资料点进来的客户可能会直接回去看下一家。

issues.title: Trust proof is missing above fold
issues.what_observed: The first desktop screen shows the logo, phone number, menu, hero headline, and buttons, but no review rating, licence detail, years in business, or completed-job proof.
issues.why_problem: Roofing is a high-cost, high-trust service. A Google-searching visitor wants quick reassurance that the business is legitimate before calling.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Above the fold should include 3-4 compact trust markers such as star rating, insured/licensed wording, Brisbane service area, and number of roofs completed.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a trust strip directly under the header or inside the hero with Google rating, licensed and insured claim, local Brisbane coverage, and a proof metric.
issues.plain_explanation: 首屏没有马上告诉客户“我们值得信任”，比如评价、资质、保险或本地案例。
issues.customer_impact: 屋顶工程金额高，客户会更谨慎。缺少信任信息会让本来准备打电话的人先去比较别家公司，尤其是从 GBP 进来的冷流量。

issues.title: CTA labels compete
issues.what_observed: The desktop header has a wide coral bar saying “BOOK YOUR FREE ROOF CONSULTATION” while the hero button below says “BOOK A FREE CONSULTATION”.
issues.why_problem: Two similar calls to action in different places make the page feel repetitive and less deliberate, instead of guiding the visitor to one obvious next step.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: One primary action should dominate, with the phone number as the immediate alternative for urgent roof problems.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Use one consistent primary CTA label across header and hero, such as “Get a Free Roof Quote”, and pair it with a click-to-call phone button.
issues.plain_explanation: 页面上有两个很像的预约按钮，文字也不完全一样，看起来不够统一。
issues.customer_impact: 客户越需要思考点哪里，越容易退出。小的犹豫会减少来电和询盘，特别是手机用户。

issues.title: Mobile hides the phone number
issues.what_observed: On mobile, the top bar shows only a phone icon and hamburger icon; the actual number “1300 734 148” is not visible.
issues.why_problem: A phone-searching customer with a leaking or damaged roof often wants to call immediately. Hiding the number behind an icon adds doubt and friction.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile header should show a tappable phone button with either the full number or a clear “Call 1300 734 148” label visible without scrolling.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the standalone phone icon with a visible click-to-call control reading “Call 1300 734 148” or add a sticky bottom call bar.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机顶部只有电话图标，没有直接显示电话号码。
issues.customer_impact: 本地搜索很多发生在手机上。客户想马上打电话时，如果看不到号码，可能会返回 Google 选择另一个更容易联系的屋顶公司。

issues.title: Mobile hero text is cramped
issues.what_observed: The mobile hero stacks “BRISBANE ROOF REPLACEMENTS” and “AND BUILDING PROFESSIONALS” over a busy roof image, with divider lines and a large angled overlay taking much of the space.
issues.why_problem: On a small screen, the message takes effort to read and does not quickly answer what the company does, where it works, and why to trust it.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile should use a single-column hero with a short headline, one supporting line, readable 16px+ text, and a primary call button visible immediately.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Simplify the mobile hero to “Brisbane Roof Replacement & Repairs” with one support line, stronger contrast, and remove decorative divider lines.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机首屏文字和图片挤在一起，重点不够直接。
issues.customer_impact: 手机访客通常滑动很快。如果前 8 秒看不懂你做什么、能不能服务 Brisbane，他们很容易离开。

issues.title: Service list dominates mobile
issues.what_observed: Immediately under the mobile “QUICK QUOTE” bar, six dark service rows fill the screen with icons, uppercase labels, and chevrons.
issues.why_problem: The list is useful, but it pushes trust proof, reviews, photos, and contact reassurance out of view. A visitor may see options before feeling confident to act.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile should show the main CTA, then a compact trust row, then 3-4 top services with a “View all services” option.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Keep only the highest-intent services near the top, add review/licence proof above the list, and move the full service menu lower on the page.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机上很快就进入一长串服务菜单，但还没先建立信任。
issues.customer_impact: 客户不是只想看菜单，他们要先确认这家公司靠谱。信任信息太晚出现，会降低从 GBP 进入后的来电意愿。

issues.title: Social sidebar feels old
issues.what_observed: The desktop screenshot shows a small vertical social media bar floating on the right edge with Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube icons.
issues.why_problem: For an urgent local roofing decision, these icons distract from calling or requesting a quote and make the interface feel like an older template.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Social links should be placed quietly in the footer, while the right side or sticky area is reserved for phone and quote actions.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove the floating social sidebar and use that attention for a sticky call/quote control or leave the hero visually cleaner.
issues.plain_explanation: 右侧浮动社交图标看起来像旧模板，也不是客户最需要的操作。
issues.customer_impact: 屋顶客户最有价值的动作是打电话或询价。任何分散注意力的按钮都会让有效线索少一点。

positive_observations: The business name and phone number are prominent on desktop.
The coral quote button stands out clearly against the muted page colors.
The mobile service rows make the main roofing services easy to scan.
redesign_priorities: 1. Make mobile contact immediate with a visible click-to-call number and sticky quote/call action.
2. Rebuild the hero with sharper roofing imagery, clearer Brisbane service wording, and stronger text contrast.
3. Add trust proof above the fold: reviews, licence/insurance wording, local proof, and project credibility.
